name: Funko, Inc.
business: Funko is a leading pop culture consumer products company. It creates whimsical, fun and unique products that enable fans to express their affinity for their favorite pop culture content. The company sells through specialty retailers, mass-market retailers, e-commerce sites, and directly to consumers.

exposures.sentence: Funko is a leading pop culture consumer products company.
Additionally, we are continuing to invest in our direct-to-consumer channel to expand our reach and further strengthen our relationship with our fan base.
